summary:
======================================================================
EXPERIMENT B  QUORUM queue survives leader loss (RabbitMQ 4.0)
======================================================================
  cluster whole, RabbitMQ 4.0.9, connected via rmq0
  declared quorum queue 'qq' (x-queue-type=quorum)
  quorum members: 3 -> ['rabbit@rmq0', 'rabbit@rmq1', 'rabbit@rmq2']
  publishing 5000 persistent messages with publisher confirms...
  broker positively confirmed: 5000 / 5000   (queue depth 5000)
  current leader: rabbit@rmq0  ->  docker kill rmq0
  new leader elected: rabbit@rmq1

  >>> confirmed = 5000   recovered = 5000   LOST = 0  (0.0% of confirmed messages)

======================================================================
EXPERIMENT C  QUORUM queue availability vs surviving-node count (RabbitMQ 4.0)
======================================================================
  quorum queue 'qq.avail' declared, members=3
  3 nodes up (majority)  : 50/50 confirmed
  2 nodes up (majority)  : 50/50 confirmed
  1 node up  (MINORITY)  : 0/50 confirmed  (expected 0: no quorum -> consistency over availability)
